data.title: UnitedHealth Stock Up Over 4% After Key Signal, Amid Market Turmoil
data.description: Even as Tariff-induced volatility reigns in the market, UnitedHealth shares rallied up to more than 4% after this key trading signal.

data.title: Marvell Offloads Auto Ethernet Segment To Infineon Tech For $2.5 Billion Cash
data.description: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) to sell Automotive Ethernet business to Infineon Technologies AG (OTC: IFNNY) for $2.5 billion in cash.

data.title: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen's Support For Trump Faces New Test After He Posts '$10,000 iPhone' Tweet Amid Market Turmoil And Tariff Fallout
data.description: Trump supporter GameStop CEO mocks tariffs with viral tweets.

data.title: Billionaire Banker Backs Trump's 'Shock And Awe' Tariff Policies, Slams Bill Ackman's Call For 90-Day Pause
data.description: Andrew Beal, the billionaire founder and owner of Beal Financial Corporation, has publicly supported President Donald Trump's contentious tariff policies, despite the resulting upheaval in the financial markets.

data.title: Despite Tariff Turmoil, Bitcoin Outperforms 'Magnificent 7' Stocks In 2025 — Records Smaller Losses Than Nvidia, Tesla, Apple
data.description:
Stocks and cryptocurrencies have been punched hard amid fears of economic fallout from President Donald Trump’s sweeping tariff measures.



Even so, Bitcoin, the world's largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, has fared better than some of Wall Street’s tech behemoths.
